creator: david@catwhisker.org
text:
MAINAINER for x11/piewm is presently ports@FreeBSD.org.

	I actually use piewm as my primary WM (and have done so for
	several years).  (I know of very few others who use it.)
	I also found bugs & submitted patches for it in the past.

	Finally, were something to happen to cause it to stop working,
	my productivity could be seriously impacted (especially if tvtwm
	were also unavailable).

How-To-Repeat: 	n/a
